title: Best Practices for Frontend Testing Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on frontend testing best practices.

questions.question: Regarding frontend testing, why should you avoid testing 'implementation details'?
options: To make tests more resilient to code refactoring and changes in internal logic

questions.question: Which of these is a key rule of writing descriptive test case names?
options: They should describe specifically what function or component is being tested and what the expected result is
They should be as short as possible

questions.question: Regarding the frontend testing, what is the key benefit of isolating your tests from external systems?
options: It increases your confidence in the correctness of your application's user interface by removing dependency on unstable data
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
